problem id: 75cd12f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11011000 -> 10001101
  10111111 -> 01111011
  00011000 -> 10000001
  10000000 -> 00001000
  00110101 -> 01010011
  11010101 -> 01011101
  01001000 -> 10000100
  11001000 -> 10001100

query: 11101001
predicted answer: 00011110
